title: Lady Bolognese Class War
description: "Ridiculously funny" and "Extraordinarily talented" (The Reviews Hub) clown duo LADY BOLOGNESE are encouraging YOU, dumb-dumb, to GO BACK TO SCHOOL. But beware: your dinnerladies, Barbara and Veronica are in charge now. And they’re serving up a scrumptious blend of greasy friendship and anarchic delight, with hints of impending peril. If you behave, you’ll be home in time for cocoa and Fray Bentos. It’s Thelma & Louise meets George’s Marvellous Medicine meets a big pile of offal. So feed, learn, and come of age. Lady Bolognese have prepared their specialty. Come to class. It's gonna be a riot. Winners of 2026 Leicester Comedy Festival Award for Best Variety Show. (Adult audiences only, Rated 14+)

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
